# Let's load the uploaded file to inspect content
file_path = '/mnt/data/file-199FAzirNd2ad29BB6Z2qj-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(file_path, encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
print(text[:2000])

import re

spans = re.findall(r'\(aya_start\)(.*?)\(aya_end\)', text, re.DOTALL)
for i, s in enumerate(spans,1):
    print(i, repr(s.strip()), "\n")

# Extract reference ayahs more reliably using regex patterns
refs = []
# Pattern for the first ref: after كقوله تعالى:\s*(.*?)\s*(?=[-–])
m1 = re.search(r'كقوله تعالى:\s*(.*?)\s*-', text)
if m1:
    refs.append(m1.group(1).strip())
# Second ref: 'طول الفصل، كقوله تعالى\s*(.*?)\s*يوسف'
m2 = re.search(r'طول الفصل، كقوله تعالى\s*(.*?)\s*يوسف', text)
if m2:
    refs.append(m2.group(1).strip())
# Third ref: 'التنزيه، كقوله تعالى\s*(.*?)\s*N?حل'
m3 = re.search(r'التنزيه، كقوله تعالى\s*(.*?)\s*نحل', text)
if m3:
    refs.append(m3.group(1).strip())
# Fourth ref: 'كما في قوله تعالى\s*(.*?)\s*الواقعة'
m4 = re.search(r'كما في قوله تعالى\s*(.*?)\s*الواقعة', text)
if m4:
    refs.append(m4.group(1).strip())
refs

# print substring around for the 3rd ref
idx = text.find('وَيَجْعَلُونَ')
print(text[idx:idx+100])

# get first ref full snippet
start = text.find('وَقالَ الَّذِي آمَنَ')
end_gh = text.find('غافر')
print(text[start:end_gh].strip())

# fourth ref
s4 = text.find('فَلا أُقْسِمُ')
e4 = text.find('الواقعة')
print(text[s4:e4].strip())

# second ref
s2 = text.find('يا أَبَتِ')
e2 = text.find('يوسف')
print(text[s2:e2].strip())

# third ref
s3 = text.find('وَيَجْعَلُونَ')
e3 = text.find(' النحل')
print(text[s3:e3].strip())

# compile spans
citations = []

# 1. numbered ayas
for m in re.finditer(r'\(aya_start\)(.*?)\(aya_end\)', text, re.DOTALL):
    full = m.group(1)
    span = full.strip()
    # find trimmed inside m.span()
    region = text[m.start(1):m.end(1)]
    # find span inside region
    idx = region.find(span)
    if idx>=0:
        abs_start = m.start(1) + idx
        abs_end = abs_start + len(span)
    else:
        # fallback to global search
        abs_start = text.find(span)
        abs_end = abs_start + len(span)
    # classify as Aya
    citations.append((abs_start, abs_end, span, 'Aya'))

# 2. hadith occurrences
hadith = 'إنما بعثت معلما'
for m in re.finditer(hadith, text):
    # ensure it's within quotes context? but we take all
    start = m.start()
    end = m.end()
    citations.append((start, end, hadith, 'Hadeeth'))

# 3. reference ayas
# first ref
r1 = text[text.find('وَقالَ الَّذِي آمَنَ'): text.find('غافر')].strip()
start = text.find(r1)
end = start + len(r1)
citations.append((start, end, r1, 'Aya'))

# second ref
r2 = text[text.find('يا أَبَتِ'): text.find('يوسف')].strip()
start = text.find(r2)
end = start + len(r2)
citations.append((start, end, r2, 'Aya'))

# third ref 
r3 = text[text.find('وَيَجْعَلُونَ'): text.find(' النحل')].strip()
start = text.find(r3)
end = start + len(r3)
citations.append((start, end, r3, 'Aya'))

# fourth ref
r4 = text[text.find('فَلا أُقْسِمُ'): text.find('الواقعة')].strip()
start = text.find(r4)
end = start + len(r4)
citations.append((start, end, r4, 'Aya'))

# sort by start
citations_sorted = sorted(citations, key=lambda x: x[0])
for c in citations_sorted:
    print(c[0], c[1], c[3], c[2][:50]+'...')

# verify each
for start,end,span,typ in citations_sorted:
    assert text[start:end] == span, (f"Mismatch for span starting {start}: found {repr(text[start:end])} expecting {repr(span)}")
print("All matched!")

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":278,"span_end":396,"span_text":"وَقُلْ إِنِّي نَذِرٌ لِّرَبِّي وَلَا أَقُولُ لِلَّذِينَ تَجْهَرُ بِالْعَمَلِ السَّيِّئَاتِ مَا تَفْعَلُونَ مِنْ شَيْءٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":458,"span_end":473,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":627,"span_end":791,"span_text":"وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ * فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ السَّاجِدِينَ * وَاعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِيَكَ الْيَقِينُ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":852,"span_end":867,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1017,"span_end":1070,"span_text":"وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ الذِّكْرَىٰ تَنْفَعُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1131,"span_end":1146,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1298,"span_end":1450,"span_text":"وَلَا تَسْتَوِي الْحَسَنَةُ وَلَا السَّيِّئَةُ ۚ ادْفَعْ بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ فَإِذَا الَّذِي بَيْنَكَ وَبَيْنَهُ عَدَاوَةٌ كَأَنَّهُ وَلِيٌّ حَمِيمٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1507,"span_end":1522,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1763,"span_end":1925,"span_text":"وَقالَ الَّذِي آمَنَ يا قَوْمِ اتَّبِعُونِ أَهْدِكُمْ سَبِيلَ الرَّشادِ* يا قَوْمِ إِنَّما هذِهِ الْحَياةُ الدُّنْيا مَتَاعٌ وَإِنَّ الْآخِرَةَ هِيَ دارُ الْقَرَارِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1998,"span_end":2098,"span_text":"يا أَبَتِ إِنِّي رَأَيْتُ أَحَدَ عَشَرَ كَوْكَباً وَالشَّمْسَ وَالْقَمَرَ رَأَيْتُهُمْ لِي ساجِدِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":2314,"span_end":2380,"span_text":"وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِلَّهِ الْبَناتِ سُبْحانَهُ وَلَهُمْ ما يَشْتَهُونَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":2420,"span_end":2500,"span_text":"فَلا أُقْسِمُ بِمَواقِعِ النُّجُومِ* وَإِنَّهُ لَقَسَمٌ لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عَظِيمٌ","citation_type":"Aya"}]}
